mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental WHERE rental_status = 'RENTED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental WHERE rental_status = 'RENTED' AND due_date < CURDATE()

SELECT r.rental_id, r.user_id, r.copy_id, r.rental_status, r.rental_date, r.due_date, r.return_date, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title FROM rental r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN book_copy bc ON r.copy_id = bc.copy_id INNER JOIN book b ON bc.book_id = b.book_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT user_id, email, name, phone, role, status, restrict_until, created_at, updated_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, restrict_until = #{restrictUntil}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.rental_id, r.user_id, r.copy_id, r.rental_status, r.rental_date, r.due_date, r.return_date, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title FROM rental r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN book_copy bc ON r.copy_id = bc.copy_id INNER JOIN book b ON bc.book_id = b.book_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
